item.description:
Fixes:
  • Dismissable upgrade banner now correctly handles already-installed releases
  • The Switch tool now runs via a .command file instead of AppleScript for improved reliability
  • Claude OAuth usage now backs off on 429 rate limits and keeps the last successful snapshot
New:
  • Added an install-count badge to the project README powered by GitHub Actions
  • Migrated the landing site to Astro from TokenBar-Tauri
